ActionList.sort: Sort field, optional value: createTime (command creation time)
ActionList.ascending: Whether to sort ascending, default false
ActionList.action.id: Command ID, used only for querying execution history, e.g.: c-jPwwUBxxxxxxxxxx
ActionList.action.name: Command name, used only for querying execution history
ActionList.action.command: Filter criteria related to command execution
ActionList.action.fileUpload: Filter criteria related to file upload
